title: The next era of AI coding
summary: Michael Truell, CEO of Cursor, discusses the shift from manual coding to AI-assisted and autonomous agent-driven development. He presents data showing 30% of Cursor PRs are fully agent-developed, enterprise code went from 15% to 75% AI-generated in a year, and engineers are transitioning to managing autonomous agents rather than writing code directly.
